_comment: Power Automate Flow: Lost / Stolen Device Alert
_import_instructions: 1. Create a new Automated flow → 'When an HTTP request is received'
2. Paste the JSON schema into 'Request Body JSON Schema'
3. Copy the generated URL into the SPFx property pane under 'Lost / Stolen Device Alert'

trigger.type: When an HTTP request is received

actions.subject: 🚨 URGENT: @{triggerBody()?['event']} — @{triggerBody()?['assetId']} (@{triggerBody()?['model']})
actions.body:
🚨 Device @{triggerBody()?['event']} Report

Asset ID@{triggerBody()?['assetId']}
Model@{triggerBody()?['model']}
Serial No.@{triggerBody()?['serialNumber']}
Last Assigned To@{triggerBody()?['lastAssignedTo']} (@{triggerBody()?['lastAssignedEmail']})
Department@{triggerBody()?['department']}
Asset Value₹@{triggerBody()?['cost']}
Reported By@{triggerBody()?['reportedBy']}
Date/Time@{triggerBody()?['timestamp']}

Please initiate the appropriate security and HR procedures immediately.

actions.type: Post adaptive card in a chat or channel (Teams)

actions._comment: Optional: Create an incident ticket in ServiceNow / Jira Service Desk
